# Lazada Thailand (lazada.co.th)

Lazada Thailand is a leading e-commerce platform providing a high-trust digital shopping environment through specialized channels, advanced AI technology, and a robust logistics network.

## Major Shopping Campaigns

Lazada Thailand hosts high-impact "Mega Campaigns" throughout the year, featuring significant discounts (up to 90% off), stackable vouchers, and exclusive rewards.

* **Birthday Sale (March)**: An annual anniversary celebration (e.g., March 2025) featuring "Epic" price drops, limited-time flash sales, and specially curated "Surprise Boxes" from top brands.
* **Double-Digit Sales**: Major monthly shopping festivals including the 6.6 Mid-Year Sale, 9.9 Mega Brands Sale, 11.11 (Biggest Sale of the Year), and 12.12 All-Out Year-End Sale.
* **Super Brand Days**: 24-hour exclusive brand takeovers offering unique "shoppertainment" experiences and deep discounts from global and local premium partners.

## Core Consumer Channels

* **LazMall**: The region's largest virtual mall connecting shoppers to leading brands. It operates under the "Four Guarantees": 100% Authenticity (2x money-back if proven counterfeit), On-Time Delivery, Stock Availability, and a premium 30-day easy return policy.
* **LazFlash**: Features hourly price drops and limited-time deals on trending items, providing "Always the Better Price" across all categories.
* **LazBeauty**: The premier destination for beauty enthusiasts, featuring the LazBeauty Club with exclusive member prices. It offers innovative tools like "Skin Test" (AI-powered skin analysis) and "Virtual Try-On" for makeup products.

## Consumer Services & Innovation

* **30-Day Returns**: Effective 2024, the standard return period for LazMall and Choice items is 30 days, allowing customers ample time to evaluate their purchases for satisfaction or "Change of Mind."
* **AI Lazzie**: An AI-powered personal shopping assistant that enables "conversational shopping," helping users discover products, find the best voucher combinations, and receive personalized recommendations.
* **Lazada Membership**: A four-tier loyalty program (Classic, Silver, Gold, and Diamond) where members earn points for rewards. Higher tiers unlock priority delivery, faster dispute resolution, and exclusive lifestyle perks such as iQIYI VIP trials.
* **Guaranteed Delivery**: Eligible orders come with a promised delivery date. If a delay occurs, Lazada provides automatic compensation via LazRewards or vouchers.
* **Secure Payments**: Supports a wide range of secure payment methods, including Cash on Delivery (COD), Lazada Wallet, installments, and major credit cards (including co-branded UOB Lazada cards for extra reward points).
